title: About Me
description: My name is **Arnas Lebedevas**, and I’m passionate about designing and building reliable software solutions. Over the years, I’ve focused on creating applications that are **scalable**, **maintainable**, and built with **clean architecture**, thoughtful decisions, and attention to detail. I believe good software should be functional, easy to extend, and built to last.

Today, I work as a **Full Stack Developer at Solutionlab Production**, while also contributing at **Qubic**. My background in **consulting** and diverse project environments has given me the chance to solve complex challenges and deliver impactful solutions.
